title: gmail-mirror: Instant Search Across 205,000 Emails Finds $30K in Missed Opportunities
author: Zachary Proser
description: I built gmail-mirror, a Go CLI that syncs your entire Gmail inbox into a local SQLite database with FTS5 full-text search. First analysis: found 65 expert network consultations I'd missed, worth ~$30K. Here's how it works and why local email search beats Gmail's API every time.
